Meniscus Tear Rehabilitation

A meniscus tear can make walking, squatting, and twisting painful. Our one-on-one rehabilitation in Slidell guides you from injury through full recovery — whether you've had surgery or are managing your tear conservatively.

Call (985) 641-5825 Request Appointment

Understanding Meniscus Tears

The meniscus is a C-shaped piece of cartilage in your knee that acts as a shock absorber. Tears can occur from:

Acute Injury

Twisting or pivoting with the foot planted — common in sports like football, basketball, and soccer
